disclaimer: GearSnitch is a journal, not medical advice. Consult a qualified clinician before injecting anything. Dosing math is provided as-is with no warranty.

recommendedDose.notes: Cycle 4-6 weeks on, 2 weeks off.
Loading 4-6 weeks then maintenance.

substances.name: CJC-1295 (no DAC)
substances.warningText: GH secretagogue — hormonal effects

recommendedDose.notes: Often stacked with Ipamorelin.

substances.name: Ipamorelin
substances.warningText: GH secretagogue — hormonal effects

recommendedDose.notes: Pulse AM/PM or pre-bed.

substances.name: Sermorelin
substances.warningText: GH secretagogue — hormonal effects

recommendedDose.notes: Dose pre-bed to mimic natural GH pulse.

substances.name: GHRP-2
substances.warningText: GH secretagogue — may raise cortisol/prolactin

recommendedDose.notes: Can elevate cortisol and prolactin.

substances.name: GHRP-6
substances.warningText: GH secretagogue — strong appetite stimulant

recommendedDose.notes: Strong hunger response ~30 min post-inject.

substances.name: Tesamorelin
substances.warningText: FDA-approved for HIV lipodystrophy only

recommendedDose.notes: Rx-only in most jurisdictions.

substances.name: Hexarelin
substances.warningText: Strong GHS — rapid desensitization

recommendedDose.notes: Cycle to avoid receptor desensitization.

substances.name: MK-677 (Ibutamoren)
substances.warningText: Oral — insulin resistance risk

recommendedDose.notes: Oral not injected. Raises IGF-1 and appetite.
Emerging research — limited human data.
Copper peptide — stains blue.
Typical protocol 10-20 day course.
Intranasal delivery preferred.
Intranasal. Russian stroke-recovery Rx.

substances.name: Melanotan II
substances.warningText: Melanoma risk — mole changes reported

recommendedDose.notes: Titrate slowly. Monitor moles.

substances.name: PT-141 (Bremelanotide)
substances.warningText: Can spike blood pressure transiently

recommendedDose.notes: FDA-approved (Vyleesi) for HSDD in women.
Dose pre-bed.
GH fragment — no growth effects.
Rx in many countries for hep-B, immune deficiency.

substances.name: LL-37
substances.warningText: Pro-inflammatory at high doses

recommendedDose.notes: Emerging research peptide.
Alpha-MSH fragment.

substances.name: Cerebrolysin
substances.warningText: Porcine-derived — infection risk if unsterile

recommendedDose.notes: Dosed by mL of branded solution, not mg.

substances.name: Dihexa
substances.warningText: Very limited human safety data

recommendedDose.notes: Research chemical — limited human data.

substances.name: Oxytocin
substances.warningText: Potent hormone — uterine effects in women

recommendedDose.notes: Dosed in IU not mg. Intranasal preferred.

substances.name: Tirzepatide (Mounjaro)
substances.warningText: Rx — thyroid C-cell tumor warning

substances.name: Semaglutide (Ozempic / Wegovy)
substances.warningText: Rx — thyroid C-cell tumor warning

substances.name: Retatrutide
substances.warningText: Investigational — phase-3 trials ongoing

recommendedDose.notes: Phase 2/3 protocols titrate over 6 months.
Causes flushing/cramping — push slowly.
Often stacked with vitamin C.
Emerging research.

substances.name: FOXO4-DRI
substances.warningText: Very limited human data — senolytic

recommendedDose.notes: Research chemical — no human protocols established.

substances.name: 5-Amino-1MQ
substances.warningText: Research chemical — no human trials

recommendedDose.notes: Oral. Research chemical.

substances.name: Adipotide (FTPP)
substances.warningText: EXTREME CAUTION! Nephrotoxicity in primate studies

recommendedDose.notes: Only used in primate trials; nephrotoxicity reported.

substances.name: Gonadorelin
substances.warningText: Endocrine modulator

recommendedDose.notes: Used on cycle or PCT for HPTA support.

substances.name: HCG (Human Chorionic Gonadotropin)
substances.warningText: Hormonal — affects endogenous testosterone

recommendedDose.notes: Dosed in IU. Used alongside TRT or PCT.

substances.name: Kisspeptin-10
substances.warningText: Potent HPG modulator

recommendedDose.notes: Emerging research in hypogonadism and fertility.

substances.name: Liraglutide (Saxenda / Victoza)
substances.warningText: Rx — thyroid C-cell tumor warning

substances.name: P21 (Cerebrolysin analog)
substances.warningText: Research chemical — no human data

recommendedDose.notes: Research chemical.
Phase-3 trials for Barth syndrome and mitochondrial disease.

substances.name: Testosterone Enanthate
substances.warningText: EXTREME CAUTION! Schedule III controlled substance

recommendedDose.notes: TRT range. Supraphysiologic dosing carries serious cardiovascular, hepatic, and endocrine risk.

substances.name: Testosterone Cypionate
substances.warningText: EXTREME CAUTION! Schedule III controlled substance

recommendedDose.notes: TRT range. Supraphysiologic dosing carries serious cardiovascular, hepatic, and endocrine risk.

substances.name: Testosterone Propionate
substances.warningText: EXTREME CAUTION! Schedule III controlled substance

recommendedDose.notes: Short ester — more frequent injections. Same risk profile as other testosterone esters.

substances.name: Testosterone Undecanoate
substances.warningText: EXTREME CAUTION! Schedule III controlled substance

recommendedDose.notes: Long ester (Aveed) — REMS program in US due to pulmonary oil microembolism risk.

substances.name: Nandrolone Decanoate (Deca)
substances.warningText: EXTREME CAUTION! Schedule III. Prolactin + sexual dysfunction risk.

recommendedDose.notes: 19-nor. Strong HPTA shutdown, prolactin issues, 'deca dick'.

substances.name: Nandrolone Phenylpropionate (NPP)
substances.warningText: EXTREME CAUTION! Schedule III controlled substance

recommendedDose.notes: Short-ester nandrolone. Same prolactin issues as decanoate.

substances.name: Trenbolone Acetate
substances.warningText: EXTREME CAUTION! Veterinary-only. Severe cardiac, renal, and psychiatric risk.

recommendedDose.notes: Veterinary compound. Not approved for human use. Severe side effect profile.

substances.name: Trenbolone Enanthate
substances.warningText: EXTREME CAUTION! Veterinary-only. Severe cardiac, renal, and psychiatric risk.

recommendedDose.notes: Veterinary compound. Not approved for human use. Severe side effect profile.

substances.name: Boldenone (Equipoise / EQ)
substances.warningText: EXTREME CAUTION! Veterinary compound. Schedule III in US.

recommendedDose.notes: Long half-life. Raises hematocrit significantly.

substances.name: Masteron (Drostanolone Propionate)
substances.warningText: EXTREME CAUTION! Schedule III controlled substance

recommendedDose.notes: Dihydrotestosterone derivative. Mild aromatization.

substances.name: Primobolan (Methenolone)
substances.warningText: EXTREME CAUTION! Schedule III controlled substance

recommendedDose.notes: Mild profile — still carries HPTA suppression and cardiovascular risk.

substances.name: Stanozolol (Winstrol)
substances.warningText: EXTREME CAUTION! Schedule III. Hepatotoxic.

recommendedDose.notes: 17-alpha-alkylated — hepatotoxic. Tendon dryness reported.

substances.name: Oxandrolone (Anavar)
substances.warningText: EXTREME CAUTION! Schedule III. Hepatotoxic.

recommendedDose.notes: 17-alpha-alkylated — hepatotoxic even at low dose. FDA-approved for cachexia.

substances.name: Dianabol (Methandrostenolone)
substances.warningText: EXTREME CAUTION! Schedule III. Severe hepatotoxicity and hypertension.

recommendedDose.notes: 17-alpha-alkylated — hepatotoxic. Strong aromatization.

substances.name: Anadrol (Oxymetholone)
substances.warningText: EXTREME CAUTION! Schedule III. Among the most hepatotoxic steroids.

recommendedDose.notes: 17-alpha-alkylated — severely hepatotoxic. FDA-approved for anemia.

substances.name: Halotestin (Fluoxymesterone)
substances.warningText: EXTREME CAUTION! Schedule III. Among the most hepatotoxic steroids.

recommendedDose.notes: 17-alpha-alkylated — severely hepatotoxic. Strength/aggression compound.

substances.name: Turinabol (4-chlorodehydromethyltestosterone)
substances.warningText: EXTREME CAUTION! Schedule III. Hepatotoxic. Long detection window.

recommendedDose.notes: 17-alpha-alkylated. Long metabolite detection window (months).

substances.name: Methyltestosterone
substances.warningText: EXTREME CAUTION! Schedule III. Severe hepatotoxicity.

recommendedDose.notes: 17-alpha-alkylated — severely hepatotoxic. Rarely used today.

substances.name: Proviron (Mesterolone)
substances.warningText: EXTREME CAUTION! Schedule III controlled substance

recommendedDose.notes: DHT derivative. SHBG binder.

substances.name: Mesterolone
substances.warningText: EXTREME CAUTION! Schedule III controlled substance

recommendedDose.notes: Same molecule as Proviron — listed separately per founder spec.

substances.name: HCG (PCT/TRT use)
substances.warningText: EXTREME CAUTION! Rx-only when used with steroids for HPTA rescue.

recommendedDose.notes: Used alongside TRT or in PCT. Dosed in IU. Same molecule as the peptide HCG entry.

substances.name: Sustanon 250
substances.warningText: EXTREME CAUTION! Schedule III controlled substance

recommendedDose.notes: Blend of 4 testosterone esters. Same risk profile as testosterone.

substances.name: DHEA
substances.warningText: EXTREME CAUTION! Hormonal precursor — endocrine effects

recommendedDose.notes: Adrenal hormone precursor — OTC in US but still endocrine-active.

substances.name: Clomiphene (Clomid)
substances.warningText: EXTREME CAUTION! Rx-only SERM. Visual disturbances reported.

recommendedDose.notes: SERM — FDA-approved for female infertility. Off-label for male PCT.

substances.name: Tamoxifen (Nolvadex)
substances.warningText: EXTREME CAUTION! Rx-only SERM. DVT / stroke risk.

recommendedDose.notes: SERM — FDA-approved for breast cancer. Off-label for PCT/gyno.

substances.name: Anastrozole (Arimidex)
substances.warningText: EXTREME CAUTION! Rx-only AI. Crashing estrogen causes joint/lipid issues.

recommendedDose.notes: Aromatase inhibitor. Over-use crashes E2 and ruins lipids.

substances.name: Letrozole (Femara)
substances.warningText: EXTREME CAUTION! Rx-only. Stronger AI than anastrozole.

recommendedDose.notes: Stronger AI than anastrozole. Easy to over-crash estrogen.

substances.name: Exemestane (Aromasin)
substances.warningText: EXTREME CAUTION! Rx-only. Irreversible (suicide) AI.

recommendedDose.notes: Steroidal suicide AI — irreversibly binds aromatase.

substances.name: Cabergoline (Dostinex)
substances.warningText: EXTREME CAUTION! Rx-only. Valvular heart disease at chronic high doses.

recommendedDose.notes: Dopamine agonist. Long-term high-dose use causes valvular heart disease.

substances.name: Superdrol (Methyldrostanolone)
substances.warningText: EXTREME CAUTION! Schedule III. Severe hepatotoxicity and lipid damage.

recommendedDose.notes: 17-alpha-alkylated — severely hepatotoxic and catastrophic on lipids.

substances.name: DHB (Dihydroboldenone / 1-Testosterone)
substances.warningText: EXTREME CAUTION! Research chemical. Schedule III in US.

recommendedDose.notes: Severe post-injection pain common.

substances.name: Trestolone (MENT)
substances.warningText: EXTREME CAUTION! Investigational. Strong HPTA shutdown.

recommendedDose.notes: Investigational male contraceptive. Strong aromatization.

substances.name: YK-11
substances.warningText: EXTREME CAUTION! Myostatin inhibitor / steroidal SARM. Hepatotoxic.

recommendedDose.notes: Technically a steroid, not a true SARM. Hepatotoxic.

substances.name: LGD-4033 (Ligandrol)
substances.warningText: EXTREME CAUTION! Unapproved. Banned by WADA.

recommendedDose.notes: SARM. Not FDA-approved. Banned by WADA.

substances.name: RAD-140 (Testolone)
substances.warningText: EXTREME CAUTION! Case reports of severe liver injury.

recommendedDose.notes: SARM. Multiple case reports of drug-induced liver injury.

substances.name: Ostarine (MK-2866)
substances.warningText: EXTREME CAUTION! Unapproved. Case reports of liver toxicity.

recommendedDose.notes: SARM. Not FDA-approved. Liver injury case reports.

substances.name: S4 (Andarine)
substances.warningText: EXTREME CAUTION! Causes dose-dependent vision disturbance.

recommendedDose.notes: SARM. Known to cause yellow-tint vision disturbance.

substances.name: S23
substances.warningText: EXTREME CAUTION! Strongest SARM. Near-total HPTA shutdown.

recommendedDose.notes: SARM. Developed as a male contraceptive — near-total HPTA shutdown.

substances.name: GW-501516 (Cardarine)
substances.warningText: EXTREME CAUTION! Trials halted — cancer in every tissue studied.

recommendedDose.notes: PPAR-delta agonist. Cancer in rats across every tissue studied.

contraindications: any cancer history or family history

substances.name: SR9009 (Stenabolic)
substances.warningText: EXTREME CAUTION! Research chemical with poor oral bioavailability.

recommendedDose.notes: Rev-ErbA agonist. Short half-life; poor oral bioavailability.
